dialogue_turns.content: Hi! My name is Karen. Nice to meet you!
Nice to meet you too, Karen! How can I help you today?
I work as a database administrator. I've been doing this for a few years now.
That's great! A database administrator — sounds interesting. What kind of things do you work on?
Outside of work I enjoy hiking, photography. I also like reading about machine learning.
Those are some great hobbies! Always good to have a healthy work-life balance.
By the way, I'm also interested in Python.
You're welcome! Let me know if you need anything else.
